name: PandaDoc
description: PandaDoc is a document automation platform for creating, sending, tracking, and e-signing proposals, contracts, and quotes. The API provides programmatic document lifecycle management including template-based generation, recipient management, form creation, content library, contact management, and legally-binding electronic signatures.

capabilities.name: document_create
capabilities.description: Create a new document from a template or from scratch.

capabilities.name: document_list
capabilities.description: List documents with filtering by status, template, or date.

capabilities.name: document_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve status and details of a specific document.

capabilities.name: document_send
capabilities.description: Send a document to recipients for review and signature.

capabilities.name: document_status_get
capabilities.description: Get the current status of a document.

capabilities.name: document_download
capabilities.description: Download a completed document as PDF.

capabilities.name: document_link_create
capabilities.description: Generate a shareable viewing/signing link for a document.

capabilities.name: document_details_get
capabilities.description: Get detailed document info including fields, tokens, and pricing.

capabilities.name: template_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific template.

capabilities.name: contact_list
capabilities.description: List contacts with search and filtering.
